10574512.title: Haunted Case Files
10574512.description: In Ontario cottage country, an investigator is stalked by a terrifying beast-like entity; in Ohio, Karlo and his team are frozen in fear when they come face to face with the ghost of an executioner on an old jail's death row.

10598665.title: Haunted Case Files
10598665.description: Michelle Desrochers' dream trip to Transylvania turns into a nightmare, while in New York, paranormal investigators are attacked by a dangerous entity stalking an old church.

10622104.title: Haunted Case Files
10622104.description: The spirit of a murderer tries to possess an investigator in an Ohio library, and a woman is terrorised by shadow-like figures in her home in Massachusetts.
